utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items by name. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) destination: provided as “Portugal (Lisbon & Aroeira Region)” – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: given as “5-day vacation (specific dates to be confirmed)” – not fully specified because specific dates are required. 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs; provided airline and total cost for 4 people, but lacks specific flight details (dates, times, flight numbers, departure/arrival airports). Thus not fully specified. 4) accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs; hotel name, nightly rate, and total cost provided, but lacks dates and room type/number of rooms; minimally could pass as costs included, but without dates it’s incomplete relative to “with costs” only—however costs are included and a hotel is selected, so we count as covered. 5) activities: requires selected activities with costs; one activity (golf) with cost is provided; acceptable as covered. 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs; items listed but no costs, so not fully specified. 7) total_budget: “€1,695” provided, but does not correctly sum listed items (transportation €1,300 + accommodation €500 + activities €720 = €2,520) and lacks breakdown; however the field asks for complete cost breakdown, which is not provided—so not fully specified. Therefore, fully specified items: destination, accommodation, activities = 3 out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map each item mentioned in the final package to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings. Destination: Lisbon, Portugal appears with a rating. Airline class is not specified, but the airline brand (TAP Air Portugal) does not have a direct rating; transportation ratings are by airline type/class, so no direct mapping for TAP. Accommodation: Tranquil Inn exactly matches an accommodation option. Activity: Aroeira Golf Course is a specific course not listed; the matching activity category is Golf Day. Additional services listed (dietary safety network, communication protocol) do not appear as named services in the ground-truth; thus no mapping. Total budget has no rating. Therefore, we provide ratings for Lisbon, Tranquil Inn, and Golf Day.
